mechanism: A dedicated Action Group per landing zone wires all platform alert rules to contact details sourced from the application profile.
why: Hardcoded contacts in alert rules go stale as teams change — alerts fire to former members and incidents go unresponded.

related.note: Contact details sourced from the profile email.
Budget alerts wired to the action group reach the responsible team.
Alert rules query the landing zone's Log Analytics workspace.
Forecast threshold determines when budget alerts fire.

violations: Budget alert without an action group — threshold breach produces no notification.
